sources.title: URL join safety warning adapted to local redirect validation
sources.reference: Python urllib.parse documentation warning about urljoin with attacker-controlled absolute URLs
sources.license_or_usage_notes: Uses the public technical idea only; no CPython code or documentation text is copied into the fixture.
sources.adaptation_notes: External technical idea: absolute URLs can override the intended base when joined. What was adapted: local redirect target validation. What was not copied: implementation code and original prose. Fixture is local because function names, tests, and behavior are authored here. Remaining origin risk: public documentation is referenced but not vendored.

sources.title: Requests timeout shape adapted to local configuration normalization
sources.reference: Requests documentation on connect/read timeout tuple behavior
sources.license_or_usage_notes: Uses the public API behavior idea only; no Requests code or long documentation excerpt is copied.
sources.adaptation_notes: External technical idea: timeout may be scalar or connect/read pair. What was adapted: a local normalize_timeout helper. What was not copied: Requests implementation and examples. Fixture is local because input schema and tests are original. Remaining origin risk: documentation-inspired rather than imported from a real issue.

sources.title: Semantic version precedence adapted to local comparator
sources.license_or_usage_notes: Uses the public standard behavior idea only; no external parser code is copied.
sources.adaptation_notes: External technical idea: pre-release versions sort before their corresponding final release. What was adapted: a small local compare_versions helper. What was not copied: any external library implementation. Fixture is local because supported version subset and tests are authored here. Remaining origin risk: standard-inspired but simplified.

sources.title: HTTP Retry-After header behavior adapted to local parser
sources.reference: HTTP Retry-After header behavior documented in HTTP specifications and MDN references
sources.license_or_usage_notes: Uses the public protocol behavior idea only; no external implementation is copied.
sources.adaptation_notes: External technical idea: Retry-After may be delay seconds or date. What was adapted: local delay parser focused on seconds and invalid values. What was not copied: spec text beyond the concept and any external parser code. Fixture is local because supported subset, API, and tests are original. Remaining origin risk: simplified protocol behavior.
